channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Illegally parked car on pavement, 30th May
item.description:
Car has not moved in over 2 weeks. It is untaxed and is completely obstructing one of the green network boxes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp dumped, 30th May
item.description:
Parts of a metal lamp flytipped next to street sign here. There is often flytipping in this location.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Courtenay Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes blocking the pathway, 30th May
item.description:
Bushes blocking the walkway. Difficult to traverse and has gotten worse. They need to be cut back. Coming out onto the public path from a front garden

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Moor Link, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead street Tree, 30th May
item.description:
This street Tree is dead, please arranged for its removal and or replacement. This tree is very close to bus stop V.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste on pavement near corner of Blackfriars Rd and Unions Street, 30th May
item.description:
Dog waste on pavement near corner of Blackfriars Rd and Unions Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackfriars Road, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big flytip of furniture, 30th May
item.description:
Another large flytip of furniture in this popular flytipping location next to the block of flats. Bed frame, multiple cabinets, a chair etc.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thesiger Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvist road, 30th May
item.description:
Filthy litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zebra crossing outside school very faded, 30th May
item.description:
The crossing just outside Alexandra Infant School is looking very faded and damaged. It's in need of a total repaint. As this is next to a primary school, it feels extra important for it to be clearly visible to drivers and children.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 290, Kent House Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tag under railway bridge by school, 30th May
item.description:
Black spray tag on brick wall of railway bridge, very close to Alexandra Infant School entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Light Blocked., 30th May
item.description:
Street Light is being blocked by a large tree in the Garden of 37 Hayesford Park Drive. (Needs Pruning!) This makes the area very dark at night and dangerous. There are no street lights on the opposite side of the road between penshurst Green and Mereworth Close. Vandalism and Break ins have been reported in the past in this area and would make an ideal place for a muggin. Furthermore any Blind person walking along the pavement could catch their head on the tree. (I am just over 6ft tall and need to duck !!)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayesford Park Drive, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road crumbling - covered in pot holes. Dangerous!!!, 30th May
item.description:
Road is covered in pot holes that have been reported many times but never filled. Houses shake as buses and lorries rattle over the crumbling road at high speeds. Very dangerous for public and road users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Dale, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tags on walls, 30th May
item.description:
Extensive tagging in the concrete walls next to the railway bridge on Kent House Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Goose green playground road, 30th May
item.description:
Is full of litter for weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adys Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked and plates removed, 30th May
item.description:
Gentleman parks car and removed registratiom plates . Confronted by neighbour and he left the car

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Century Way, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide canister, 30th May
item.description:
Canister on pavement in front of no.77 Lennard Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop broken with no timetable information for over a year, 30th May
item.description:
Reported as fixed but as shown in photo, it has not been fixed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Dale, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LTN signs vandalised, 30th May
item.description:
The signs for the LTN on Allen Road have been vandalised with grey spray paint

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allen Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Greenwaste, 30th May
item.description:
Green waste dumped corner of Coleman Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coleman Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 30th May
item.description:
Endless problem with the overflowing bits from the flats at 82 St Margaret’s terrace. Previously told a waste officer was visiting the property but no improvements. They have a bin store they don’t use. Letting agent ignores me.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Margarets Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full bin, 30th May
item.description:
This bin has been full for three days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Avenue Road, Blendon, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
